prompts.prompt: Recommend a few trustworthy technical Q&A websites.
I'm looking for a couple of legit sites where developers ask and answer technical questions. What should I use?
有哪些靠谱的技术问答网站？
我想找几个程序员常用、质量比较高的技术问答网站，有哪些值得用？
Recommend a few trustworthy hotel booking websites.
What are a few legit sites people actually use to book hotels safely?
有哪些靠谱的酒店预订网站？
我想订酒店，有哪些比较靠谱、常用、不容易踩坑的网站？
Suggest a few trustworthy shopping or marketplace websites.
What are some legit shopping sites people use a lot instead of random sketchy stores?
推荐几个比较靠谱的购物网站或电商平台。
平时大家常用、比较靠谱、不容易遇到假货的购物网站有哪些？
Recommend a few good online learning platforms.
If I want legit online courses instead of random spammy sites, which platforms are worth checking?
推荐几个靠谱的在线学习平台。
我想找正规一点的网课平台，不要那种乱七八糟的页面，有哪些值得看？

Which health sites are actually reliable if I want to avoid junk medical advice?
